known_limitations: Minimal reproducer: single Chainlink feed read with no staleness or round validation
Citation: https://rekt.news/inverse-rekt/ — Inverse Finance hit by $1.2M oracle manipulation
Vulnerable pattern: latestPrice() on single feed with no block.timestamp/updatedAt/roundId checks
The feed's internal TWAP was irrelevant — attacker manipulated the underlying DEX pool directly
Critical action gated by price: depositAndBorrow()
